name: rsalgo
description: fast running algorithms for .js/.ts written in rust

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:wasm:node && npm run build:wasm:browser && npm run build:js
scripts.build:wasm:node: wasm-pack build algorithms --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node && mkdir -p src/generated/node && cp algorithms/pkg-node/algorithms* src/generated/node/
scripts.build:wasm:browser: rm -rf algorithms/pkg-browser src/generated/browser && wasm-pack build algorithms --target bundler --out-dir pkg-browser && mkdir -p src/generated/browser && cp algorithms/pkg-browser/* src/generated/browser/
scripts.build:js: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:js:node && npm run build:js:browser
scripts.watch:rust: cd algorithms && cargo watch -s "wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node && mkdir -p ../src/generated/node && cp pkg-node/algorithms* ../src/generated/node/ && wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg-browser && mkdir -p ../src/generated/browser && cp pkg-browser/algorithms* ../src/generated/browser/"
scripts.test:rust:watch: cd algorithms && cargo watch -w src -w tests -x check -x test
scripts.dev:rust: npm run build:wasm:node && npm run build:wasm:browser && concurrently -k "npm run watch:rust" "npm run test:rust:watch"
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm:node && npm run build:wasm:browser && npm run build:js && concurrently -k "npm run watch:rust" "npm run test:rust:watch" "npm run watch:js" "npm run watch:pack:dev" "npm run test:js:watch:min"

author: David Kontrovitz

templateMeta.overridesNote: overrides patch known transitive vulnerabilities; safe within same major; remove once upstream ranges are updated.
